documents.title: Access Control Policy
documents.text: The access control policy requires annual access review and retrieval-time permission validation.

documents.title: Payroll Restricted Memo
documents.text: Payroll exports contain sensitive compensation details and require audit approval.

documents.title: Other Tenant Access Policy
documents.text: Tenant B uses quarterly badge review and separate security procedures.

queries.query: What review does the access policy require?
